testcase.name: test_petty_cash_management_endpoint
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_e2e_new_features.py:38: in accountant_session assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Accountant login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Accountant login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_se_mini_cashbook_for_accountant
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_e2e_new_features.py:38: in accountant_session assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Accountant login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Accountant login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
